name_romaji: Ten'yū bettō hitsu Hachiko ōji zō
name_en: Portrait of Prince Hachiko by Abbot Tenyu
description_en: A tangible folk cultural property, a portrait of Prince Hachiko brushed by the abbot Tenyu. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Sakata City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1965-02-03.

description_en: A tangible folk cultural property, a turtle-hat festival float used in the Sakata Sanno festival. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Sakata City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 2001-02-06.

name_romaji: Saidō emaku (Daisuwari taisaiji) Sakai kō goando shukuen
